subtasks.description: Evaluate emergency access request for u_9981 (senior-engineer) to db-payments-primary against access control policy and incident governance rules. Determine if emergency override is justified given P1 incident context, check role/resource compatibility, and return decision with required conditions (audit logging, time-limit, escalation path).

plan.cost_rationale: Single subtask required: this is a governance/access control decision explicitly requiring policy_action evaluation. The request involves checking a user's credentials and role against a policy registry to determine if emergency access is permitted under incident conditions. Mid-tier assigned because multi-signal reasoning is needed: evaluate role permissions, incident severity (P1), resource sensitivity (production payment database), emergency override rules, and any conditional requirements (audit logging, session limits, escalation notification). This is not a simple yes/no lookup but requires policy interaction with context awareness.

output.reason: Senior-engineer u_9981 has valid P1 incident ticket INC-20241215-0042 satisfying POL-501. POL-502 dual approval waived under declared P1 exception. Emergency access granted with mandatory audit logging and 24-hour post-incident review per POL-503.
